summary: Soundboard recording of decent quality captures a solid second set highlighted by strong Aiko and Terrapin Station performances.
review: The reviewer praises the second‑set pre‑drums section, calling the renditions of Aiko and Terrapin Station "very good" and noting that the show is played better than a comparable May 5th set. No specific recording issues are mentioned, implying an acceptable soundboard source, though the overall three‑star rating suggests an average listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; positive comments about the performance but a modest 3‑star rating and no concrete recording quality details.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks on clarity or mix; assumed typical soundboard fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set (pre‑drums) is highlighted as especially strong, with smooth transitions and energetic playing.
